title: chagag #2287
definition:
1) to hold a feast, hold a festival, make pilgrimage, keep a
    pilgrim-feast, celebrate, dance, stagger
   1a) (Qal)
       1a1) to keep a pilgrim-feast
       1a2) to reel
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to hold a feast, hold a festival, make pilgrimage, keep a
    pilgrim-feast, celebrate, dance, stagger
   1a) (Qal)
       1a1) to keep a pilgrim-feast
       1a2) to reel

    NASB:  to make a pilgrimage, keep a pilgrim feast
